use_codes.desc: AMYVID IS A RADIOACTIVE DIAGNOSTIC AGENT FOR POSITRON EMISSION TOMOGRAPHY (PET) IMAGING OF THE BRAIN TO ESTIMATE BETA-AMYLOID NEURITIC PLAQUE DENSITY IN ADULT PATIENTS WITH COGNITIVE IMPAIRMENT

indications.text:
AMYVID is indicated for positron emission tomography (PET) of the brain to estimate amyloid beta neuritic plaque density
in adults with cognitive impairment for:
 Evaluation of Alzheimer’s disease (AD) and other causes of cognitive decline
 Selection of patients who are indicated for amyloid beta-...
